description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open layout and a flat, expansive roof. The structure is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, several mature trees, and a paved driveway leading to a carport or garage area. The front entrance is centrally located, flanked by large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The rear of the bungalow features a private backyard area, partially enclosed by the building's L-shaped footprint, and includes a small patio or outdoor seating area. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with contrasting trim and window frames. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring mature trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and prominent trees flanking the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage/carport area and the extended driveway along the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and the L-shaped layout enclosing the private outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible rear windows, backyard, and additional trees providing shade and privacy.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
